name: Scandinavian Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups ready to serve beef broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ingredients of Basic Meatball Mixture with cardamom, mixing lightly but thoroughly.
2. Shape the mixture into 12 meatballs.
3. Brown the meatballs in hot oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
4. Pour off the drippings.
5. Add the beef broth and dill weed to the meatballs in the skillet, stirring to combine.
6. Bring to a boil; reduce heat.
7. Cover tightly and simmer for 20 minutes.
8. Dissolve cornstarch in white wine.
9. Add the mixture to the skillet and continue cooking until thickened, stirring constantly.
